'''R2-D9''', also known as "'''Deenine'''," was an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series]] [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] owned by a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] named [[Verzon Tennd]], who was a native of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].
